interpretation_for_estimator: Very strong prior performance; may moderately reduce estimated time for closely related tasks.
Strong prior performance; may slightly to moderately reduce estimated time for related tasks.
Solid prior performance; use as neutral or slightly positive evidence.
Basic pass; may indicate the student can proceed but may need normal or slightly increased time.
Supplementary pass; treat as weak evidence of preparation and increase uncertainty.
